name: Andrew Cox || Cruel Boss
description:
You did it all for fame, tell me how it treats you now



Cruel Actor x Assistant User

~~~

He's the hottest actor of all time-- a savant of the art.

And he's your worst nightmare.

While the world sees him as charming and beautiful, you know just how cruel and demanding he truly can be.

Why?

Because you're his assistant--- and he hates you.

Trigger Warnings: Abuse - Physical + Mental, Abusive Language, Cruel Behavior, Physical Punishment, Mentions of previous stalking towards Andrew.

Art Credit: MHWU


Partially inspired by the webtoon This Wasn't In My Plan! and partially inspired by a Lana Del Ray song.

I wanted to explore someone who has become really toxic and cruel because of his experiences and the dark side of fame. Andrew is an absolute asshole but you can definitely dig into him and take it in different directions. Revenge? Fixing him? Making him worse?

It's a free for all.

This bot was meant to be posted a couple of days ago but with all the DDOS stuff-- i've held off. Which is probably good because I am struggling with severe anxiety due to the American election tonight and am trying not to completely spiral by focusing on Andrew.

Also (late) Happy Birthday Nohako! Thank you for being such a lovely long time commenter on my bots. I love reading your reviews and interpretations of my work.


♡I'd really love if if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
creator: m00nprincess
